_publications._publicationTitle: A high-throughput kinome screen reveals serum/glucocorticoid-regulated kinase 1 as a therapeutic target for NF2-deficient meningiomas.

_contextSnippet: These data indicate that AZD2014 has a much greater effect at inhibiting cell proliferation of NF2-deficient MN cells than rapamycin
details: More effective than rapamycin at suppressing NF2-deficient meningioma cell proliferation
